headline: Reusable Data Handlers with Generics
caption:
Ever found yourself writing similar code to handle different data types? Generics in TypeScript can make your life easier by allowing you to write reusable, type-safe functions. Instead of multiple versions for each data type, you write one pattern that adapts seamlessly. It’s a simple shift that can save hours in development and audit time. Plus, your code becomes cleaner and easier to maintain. Next time you're dealing with various data structures, think about implementing a generic handler. It’s a real pattern that unlocks efficiency in everyday coding! ✨

#TypeScript #CodingTips #WebDev #FullStackLife
